rubrics: The response classifies the policy as TRANSFER
The response sets income_effect_exists to true
The response computes the annual fiscal cost (at least $3 trillion)
The response identifies at least 5 transmission channels including direct income, demand stimulus, inflationary pressure, and labor supply
The downstream_directives tell sector agents to INCLUDE income-side calculations
The response flags the funding mechanism as a major uncertainty
The response includes evidence from UBI pilot studies (Stockton, Finland, or similar)
